arts.ttl: Blades fined again: Maybe it’s time to let the football do the talking
arts.sum: Sheffield United’s game against Leeds United tonight will be televised on Sky Sports Football. However, based on recent times any encounter involving the Blades would more appropriately be found on the undercard of a Box Office Main Event. Now, we all love a bit of passion and willingness to fight for the badge. arts.ttl: Sheffield United are in Leeds’ shadow - Wilder
arts.sum: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder has admitted that his club perhaps perceive themselves in the shadows of Leeds United, given historic developments between the two clubs. Chris Wilder bigs up Leeds United club size

arts.ttl: Wilder pays tribute to former Blades defender Baldock
arts.sum: Sheffield United manager Chris Wilder says George Baldock "meant so much to everybody" as he pays tribute to the former Blades defender following his shock death last week.

arts.ttl: Arsenal star Ben White opens up on Bielsa's harsh treatment of him at Leeds
arts.sum: "When I first went to Leeds, I got in there, two days in I was in the first-team changing room," he said. Ben White says Marcelo Bielsa's tough training regime at Leeds United pushed him to his limits and helped shape him into the player he is today.

arts.ttl: Team news: Leeds squad revealed v Sheff Utd
arts.sum: Leeds United winger duo Dan James and Manor Solomon are available for tonight’s clash with Sheffield United after recent injury issues. LeedsLive have now revealed the squad that is going to face the Blades this evening, looking to end their unbeaten run and move joint-top of the Championship in the process.

arts.ttl: Sheffield United to honour George Baldock before Leeds match
arts.sum: Baldock, who passed away earlier this month, played more than 200 times for the club

arts.ttl: Worrying Daniel Farke record emerges as Leeds United face Sheffield United
arts.sum: Daniel Farke’s Leeds side are looking for automatic promotion this season instead of the playoffs, and they face probably their biggest home test yet in the form of Sheffield United. Leeds United host Sheffield United at Elland Road in the Championship for the first time since 2019, where Marcelo Bielsa lost out on promotion to Chris Wilder and Daniel Farke.

arts.ttl: Daniel Farke explains which free agent Leeds United want
arts.sum: Leeds United manager Daniel Farke has claimed that his club would have to enter the free agent market to solve the crisis at the club. arts.ttl: Patrick Bamford shares story of ex-Liverpool star Fabinho constantly singing Leeds United song
arts.sum: Leeds United striker Patrick Bamford will no doubt be reminiscent of the best season in his career, when he fired in 17 Premier League goals in 20/21, getting his campaign up and running against Liverpool. “So we had Victor Orta, who some Leeds fans gave him stick, but he is honestly one of the best guys, like in football, in terms, of just, he is pure.
